items.title: Stale pricing answer
items.scenario: You ask Claude in chat for current API price per million tokens without attaching docs.
items.explanation: Answer may reflect an old training snapshot—open platform.claude.com pricing and compare.

items.title: Grounded Q&A
items.scenario: You paste today's release notes and ask what changed in the API.
items.explanation: Cutoff matters less because facts live in the prompt; still verify you pasted the correct version.
